feed.title: NVO987 Web3 Node Feed
feed.subtitle: Decentralized identity and research infrastructure updates

entry.title: Web3 Node Initialization
entry.summary: Initial deployment of the web3 node as part of the NVO987 decentralized research infrastructure.

entry.title: Identity Integration
entry.summary: Integration with the DID-based identity root (did:web:identity.nvo987.us).
